name: Cartesia
description: AI text-to-speech platform with voice cloning, multilingual speech synthesis, and a library of pre-built voices powered by the Sonic model.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Api Key
credential_fields.description: Cartesia API key (from your Cartesia dashboard)

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List all available voices in your Cartesia account. Returns voice metadata including IDs, names, descriptions, and language support.

tools.name: get_voice
tools.description: Retrieve details for a specific voice by its ID. Returns the voice's name, description, language, and embedding information.

voice_id.description: The unique identifier of the voice to retrieve.

tools.name: create_speech
tools.description: Convert text to speech audio using the Cartesia Sonic model. Specify a voice, language, and output format to generate speech from a transcript. Returns audio bytes.

model_id.description: The model to use for speech generation (e.g. 'sonic-2024-10-19', 'sonic-english', 'sonic-multilingual').

transcript.description: The text to convert to speech.

voice.description: Voice configuration object. Use mode 'id' with a voice ID, or mode 'embedding' with a raw embedding array.

mode.description: Voice selection mode: 'id' to reference a voice by ID, or 'embedding' for a raw voice embedding.

id.description: The voice ID to use (required when mode is 'id').

embedding.description: Raw voice embedding array (required when mode is 'embedding').

encoding.description: Audio encoding format (required for raw container).

tools.name: clone_voice
tools.description: Clone a voice from an audio clip. Provide a short audio sample (about 5 seconds) to create a high-similarity voice clone. The clip should be submitted as a multipart form with the audio file.

clip.description: Base64-encoded audio clip data for cloning. Use an audio clip of about 5 seconds for best results.

mode.description: Cloning mode. 'similarity' prioritizes closeness to the original voice; 'stability' prioritizes consistent output.

enhance.description: Whether to enhance the audio clip before cloning to improve quality.
